home-tutoring.title: Get home tutoring
home-tutoring.description: 6thtouch Robotics Academy provides high-quality tutoring for students, aiming to boost their enthusiasm for technology and other subjects. We offer adaptable learning schedules and plans that cater to individual time constraints.

teacher-tutoring.title: Teachers Tutoring
teacher-tutoring.description: 6thtouch Robotics provides coaches and instructors with knowledgeable and excellent instruction on STEM Robotics. We provide them with the tools necessary for them to successfully train and instruct on robotics and coding.

coding-robotics-tutor.title: Coding & Robotics
coding-robotics-tutor.description: Receive top-notch coding and robotics training to gain deeper insights into the tech realm. Step into the world of technology with 6thtouch Robotics Academy, where we immerse you in cutting-edge technologies that are truly remarkable.

school-tutoring.title: Get school tutoring
school-tutoring.description: By using School Tutoring to enroll in 6thtouch Robotics Academy, students at that school would have a greater opportunity to be creative and innovative. Additionally, 6thtouch Robotics Academy would assist in overseeing extracurricular activities and prepare the students for national and international robotics competitions related to what we offer.

clients.description: 6th touch robotics academy was able to introduce the concept of robotics and coding to the students of grok academy
